methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 2 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Einride
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series C), post-money $1.8B

private.name: Harbinger
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series C), post-money $500M

data.narrative:
Candela is a Series C transportation technology company that has raised €129M+ to date. The valuation universe for frontier-transport companies is limited: seven private peers operate in the sector, including Einride, Harbinger, Rivian, The Boring Company, and REGENT Craft. No public comparables exist in this narrow category, constraining traditional trading multiples analysis.

The peer-median approach is not applicable here. The Transportation sector contains only two same-stage Series C peers, zero adjacent-stage datapoints, and zero valuation-tier matches—falling short of the three-company minimum required for robust statistical inference. Attempting to broaden to an all-sector median would introduce uncontrolled heterogeneity across business models, capital intensity, and technology maturity.

Given these constraints, a credible valuation for Candela cannot rest on standard triangulation methods. The company's €129M+ capital raise and stage place it in a cohort where comparable financing rounds and disclosed valuations remain sparse. Any valuation range would require supplementary methods—such as DCF analysis contingent on production timelines and unit economics, or scenario modeling around regulatory approval and market adoption. The primary uncertainty is the limited transparency of peer valuations at this stage and sector, combined with the nascent commercial maturity of frontier-transportation technologies.
